heading: Definitions
label: 3507 Definitions

children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 1 Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator’ ” means the Administrator of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.1So in original. Closing single quotation mark probably should not appear.1

children.heading: Coastal state
children.label: 2 Coastal state
children.text: The term “coastal state” has the meaning given that term by .section 1453(4) of title 16

children.heading: Working Group
children.label: 3 Working Group
children.text: The term “Working Group” means the Interagency Working Group on Ocean and Coastal Mapping under .section 3502 of this title

children.heading: Exclusive economic zone
children.label: 4 Exclusive economic zone
children.text: The term “exclusive economic zone” means the exclusive economic zone of the United States established by Presidential Proclamation No. 5030, of .March 10, 1983

children.heading: Ocean and coastal mapping
children.label: 5 Ocean and coastal mapping
children.text: The term “ocean and coastal mapping” means the acquisition, processing, management, maintenance, interpretation, certification, and dissemination of physical, biological, geological, chemical, and archaeological characteristics and boundaries of ocean and coastal areas, resources, and sea beds through the use of acoustics, satellites, aerial photogrammetry, light and imaging, direct sampling, and other mapping technologies.

children.heading: Territorial sea
children.label: 6 Territorial sea
children.text: The term “territorial sea” means the belt of sea measured from the baseline of the United States determined in accordance with international law, as set forth in Presidential Proclamation Number 5928, dated .December 27, 1988

children.heading: Nongovernmental entities
children.label: 7 Nongovernmental entities
children.text: The term “nongovernmental entities” includes nongovernmental organizations, members of the academic community, and private sector organizations that provide products and services associated with measuring, locating, and preparing maps, charts, surveys, aerial photographs, satellite imagines, or other graphical or digital presentations depicting natural or manmade physical features, phenomena, and legal boundaries of the Earth.2So in original. Probably should be “images,”.2

children.heading: Outer Continental Shelf
children.label: 8 Outer Continental Shelf
children.text: The term “Outer Continental Shelf” means all submerged lands lying seaward and outside of lands beneath navigable waters (as that term is defined in ), and of which the subsoil and seabed appertain to the United States and are subject to its jurisdiction and control.section 1301 of title 43

children.heading: Coastal Indian Tribe
children.label: 9 Coastal Indian Tribe
children.text: The term “coastal Indian Tribe” means an “Indian Tribe”, as defined in , the land of which is located in a coastal State.section 5304 of title 25
